results.trackCensoredName: Snowed In with the Mountain Man
results.trackName: Snowed In with the Mountain Man
results.description:
Lila Hart was supposed to be escaping her old life, not getting stranded on a mountain road in the middle of a snowstorm. With her car dead, no signal, and night closing in fast, her only option is Beck Mercer, the huge, gruff mountain man who finds her freezing in the snow and takes her back to his remote cabin.

Beck lives alone for a reason. He likes silence, routine, and distance. But once Lila is under his roof, cold and shaken and far too tempting, keeping his hands off her becomes the hardest thing he has done in years.

Snowed in together, the heat between them builds fast. What starts as rescue turns into something deeper, something neither of them can ignore when the roads finally clear. But Lila did not come to Black Ridge looking for a man. She came running from the life she left behind. And Beck has no intention of being just another place to hide.

Snowed In with the Mountain Man is a steamy short contemporary romance featuring forced proximity, a rugged protective hero, a snowbound cabin, and a hard-earned happy ending.
